message:
fix(tui): prevent alternate-screen scroll drift in raw mode (bd-36mc)

Dynamic viewport height computation accounts for conditional chrome
(scroll indicator, tool status, status message) so the view output
never exceeds term_height rows. Added clamp_to_terminal_height()
safety net. Syncs concurrent agent changes to config/extensions/lib.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
